name: Septerna, Inc.
summary: Septerna, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing oral small molecule therapeutics targeting G protein-coupled receptors (GPCRs). The company utilizes its proprietary Native Complex Platform to develop product candidates including SEP-479 and SEP-631. Septerna has a partnership with Novo Nordisk A/S to develop oral small molecule therapies for metabolic-related diseases targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors for obesity, type 2 diabetes, and related conditions.
